_comment: Mock SerpApi google_scholar_author response for offline testing of fetch_scholar.py. Authors are deliberately in Scholar's abbreviated form to verify full-name expansion. Run: python scripts/fetch_scholar.py --input-json tests/sample_serpapi.json --dry-run
